title: DID 4-Piece Pedicure Set, Pink Toe Separators, Nail Clipper and File
features: COMPLETE SET: 4-piece pedicure kit includes toe separators, nail clippers, and emery board for professional-quality nail care at home
TOE SEPARATORS: Soft foam toe spacers in pink colour help keep toes apart during polish application and drying
NAIL FILE: Durable emery board with dual surfaces for shaping and smoothing toenails to desired length and shape
COMPACT DESIGN: Portable size perfect for travel and home use, with all essential pedicure tools in one convenient package
PROFESSIONAL TOOLS: High-quality nail clipper with precision cutting edge ensures clean, accurate trimming of toenails
description: Transform your at-home pedicure experience with this comprehensive 4-piece pedicure set. The kit includes essential tools for achieving salon-quality results: a durable nail clipper for precise trimming, and two professional-grade toe separators in a lovely pink shade that keeps toes perfectly spaced during polish application. The set also features a smoothing file to shape and buff nails to perfection. Each component is designed for comfortable handling and effective use, making it ideal for regular nail maintenance and special occasions. The compact packaging makes this set perfect for travel or storage in your beauty kit. These quality tools help you maintain well-groomed feet whilst saving time and money on professional services.
